project_type: Python multi-agent investment analysis system with FastAPI REST API, CLI, and Jinja2 dashboard
build_system: setuptools via pyproject.toml, pip editable install
build_command: pip install -e . 2>/dev/null && python -c 'from augur.registry import AgentRegistry; print(len(AgentRegistry().get_all()))'
verification_instructions: Run pytest, confirm all tests pass including new ones. Check no regressions in existing 165 tests.
setup_instructions: pip install -e '.[dev]' from project root. yfinance is optional (pip install 'augur-agents[data]').
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network. yfinance available for real data tests but network calls should be mocked in unit tests. Python 3.11 default.
contribution_requirements: Tests in tests/ directory. Use pytest fixtures. Mock external API calls (yfinance). Follow existing test patterns (see test_iteration5.py, test_registry.py).
key_patterns: BaseAgent.analyze(MarketContext)->AgentResponse. AgentRegistry loads 18 agents. DecisionCoordinator.analyze_with_all() runs parallel ThreadPoolExecutor. get_consensus() returns weighted consensus. Dashboard at dashboard/app.py uses FastAPI TestClient in tests. CLI uses Click.
directory_structure: src/augur/ - core library (personas/, bots/, data.py, cli.py, api.py, registry.py, coordinator.py, config.py, cron.py, backtest.py). dashboard/ - FastAPI dashboard app + templates/. tests/ - pytest tests. scanner/ - legacy/alternative persona loader.
